hotel_name: Radisson Blu Hotel & Resort, Abu Dhabi Corniche
raw_description:
Prime Location:Radisson Blu Hotel & Resort, Abu Dhabi Corniche is situated in Abu Dhabi, offering easy access to attractions such as The Nation Riviera Beach Club, a 7-minute walk away, and Qasr al-Hosn, 4.4 km nearby. Zayed International Airport is 36 km from the resort.Exceptional Facilities:Guests enjoy a private beach area, spa facilities, swimming pool with a view, sauna, fitness centre, sun terrace, restaurant, bar, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a lounge, beauty services, steam room, wellness packages, and a hot tub.Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, tea and coffee makers, minibars, and sea or city views. Family rooms and interconnected rooms cater to all travellers, ensuring a pleasant stay.Dining Experience:The family-friendly restaurant offers British, Italian, Japanese, Mediterranean, Middle Eastern, and international cuisines, including vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Live music and a pool bar enhance the dining experience.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.5for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Radisson Blu Hotel & Resort, Abu Dhabi Corniche. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 4 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Free parking.
